title: Office politics with Machiavellian strategy
use_when: Office politics with Machiavellian strategy. Use when the user needs a product workflow for stakeholder management related to office politics with machiavellian strategy. Trigger terms: stakeholders, office-politics, power-dynamics, influence.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Office politics with Machiavellian strategy when the request is mainly a different lifecycle artifact; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Office politics with Machiavellian strategy strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move
framework_fit: Office politics with Machiavellian strategy fits Stakeholder Communication work in the Strategize lifecycle when the user needs Office politics with Machiavellian strategy strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Office politics with Machiavellian strategy strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move without tying recommendations to the user's Strategize stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Office politics with Machiavellian strategy as generic Stakeholder Communication advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Office politics with Machiavellian strategy when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.
